title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 159.01 resistance — BoJ intervention risk rising on a sustained break above 160.00.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD holding below 0.7132 — RBA hiking rates supports AUD carry, but AUD/USD faces headwinds from extreme retail short positioning.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD trading near 1.1736 — ECB-Fed rate differential weighs on EUR/USD, with Fed-ECB 175bp spread continuing to favor USD.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 17.5 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.20%.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break — JPY no longer acting as safe haven, with positive correlation indicating risk-on environment.
